name: Brand API (3 routes in one workflow)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source_url: $('Decode webhook').item.json.body.url, branding: $('Firecrawl: Scrape').item.json.data.branding, copy: JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content), tokens: $json.usage }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ design_md: $json.choices[0].message.content, strategy: $('Stash strategy').item.json.strategy, tokens_total: $('Stash strategy').item.json.strategy_tokens + $json.usage.total_tokens }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ html: $json.choices[0].message.content, outline: $('Stash outline').item.json.outline, tokens_total: $('Stash outline').item.json.outline_tokens + $json.usage.total_tokens }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ Object.assign({ prompt: $json.prompt, image_size: $json.image_size, quality: 'medium', num_images: 1, output_format: 'png' }, ($json.image_urls || []).length ? { image_urls: $json.image_urls } : {}) }}

assignments.name: width
assignments.value: ={{ $json.images[0].width || ({ square_hd: 1024, square: 512, portrait_4_3: 768, portrait_16_9: 576, landscape_4_3: 1024, landscape_16_9: 1024 }[$('Build prompts').item.json.image_size] || null) }}

assignments.name: height
assignments.value: ={{ $json.images[0].height || ({ square_hd: 1024, square: 512, portrait_4_3: 1024, portrait_16_9: 1024, landscape_4_3: 768, landscape_16_9: 576 }[$('Build prompts').item.json.image_size] || null) }}
